summary: Phase B-1 E2E verification complete. All 16 tests PASS: (1) Customer Portal - 12 endpoints tested with X-Portal-Session auth, data leak prevention verified - NO sensitive fields (organization_id, _seed, assigned_technician_id, internal_notes, resolution_notes) in portal ticket responses. (2) Invoice PDF - 25KB PDF with GST-compliant CGST/SGST breakdown (₹990 each for 18% GST), GSTIN, HSN codes (8507, 998719), invoice number verified.
critical_code_review_comments: customer_portal.py Lines 551-560: PORTAL_TICKET_PROJECTION correctly excludes organization_id, _seed, assigned_technician_id, internal_notes, resolution_notes, efi_preprocessing, ask_back_answers, technician_notes
customer_portal.py Lines 568-577: Same projection applied to portal ticket detail endpoint
customer_portal.py Line 511: portal_token correctly excluded from profile response
pdf_service.py Lines 273-283: CGST/SGST correctly split from IGST when intra-state (is_igst=False)
pdf_service.py Lines 309-317: Invoice totals igst_total split into cgst_total/sgst_total for intra-state billing
invoices_enhanced.py Lines 1058-1180: PDF endpoint generates GST-compliant invoice with all required elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer portal tests use X-Portal-Session header from POST /api/v1/customer-portal/login. Invoice PDF tests need X-Organization-ID header set to 'demo-volt-motors-001' to prevent conftest auto-injection of wrong org (dev-internal-testing-001). PDF content verification uses PyPDF2 for text extraction.

TASK_1_Portal_Endpoints.auth_denial: All endpoints return 401 without X-Portal-Session header

gst_compliance_verified.amount_in_words: Rupees Twelve Thousand Nine Hundred Eighty Only

TASK_2_Invoice_PDF.tax_breakdown_correct: CGST + SGST = ₹1,980 (18% GST split correctly for intra-state Delhi-to-Delhi)
